text_block_list.text:
After our outing, Gold City brings me to the
shopping mall for some reason.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer. Hold the clothes together like
that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No, this isn't it... It only works in this combination.
Wait one sec, I'm going to get another top.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
City, I think I found something! Wouldn't that one
on the mannequin work?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Which mannequin?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah, this one. Okay, let me just check the brand...
Uh-huh.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... It's all right, but I'm kinda feeling this
other one.

It doesn't seem like she's here to buy anything for
herself. She keeps bringing clothes for me to try
out.

We ran into Tosen Jordan by chance, and now the
two of them are in their own bubble, sifting
through all the clothes.
choice_data_list: Um... What is this all about?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
There's this upcoming feature where us models
are supposed to arrange everyday outfits for our
readers.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So, I'm practicing on you. Trying out the clothes
myself wouldn't be very useful, would it?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You are so lucky, you know that? Not everyone gets to have City pick out a look just for them!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey—what do you think about that one?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sure, we can try that out.

And so, they continue trying numerous items on
me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Okay. This might do, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you are serving, Trainer! Look in the
mirror!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it looks good on you. I suggest you buy it.
choice_data_list:
What?! But I don't have that much on me right
now...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Um... Check the price tag, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Mhm.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Dang, City. Were you taking price into account
this entire time?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, didn't I say this is for our readers?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Each piece needs to have versatility, but on top
of that, affordability. I want the choices to be
accessible.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So that's why you rejected my picks...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it didn't seem like you were considering price at
all. I mean, take a look at the last one.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Get out! This is, like, my entire paycheck!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You really thought everything through!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So professional!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So professional!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I mean, you're the same way too, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You always put your professional face on for
work, all serious-looking... It's cool, actually.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...But I digress. If you like the fit, I wouldn't mind
doing this again.

I would love to have her select more outfits for
me. Holding the clothes I just bought in my hands,
I can't help but feel a little excited.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, what? You're all like, "As a person with
more experience in the working world..."
choice_data_list: It's because I understand how you feel.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? Well, I guess I don't mind. A compliment's
a compliment, after all.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, thanks for helping me out with my work.
Let's do this again sometime.

Gold City is in a good mood, perhaps thanks to
the fact that we've recognized each other's
passion toward our work.
